info.title: DBAgent Action Group
info.description: Resolve a user name into the stored identifiers that fill downstream report API calls. The agent calls POST /run with { operation: "lookupUserIdentifiers", params: { userName } }; the Lambda queries the Postgres directory (db/schema.sql) and returns { found, fullName, identifiers } where identifiers maps id_type -> id_value (abaNumber, userAba, aba, abaGroup, rollupAbaName, endpoint, denomination, differenceType, zone, period, denomType, requestId, criteria).

post.summary: Resolve a user name to its stored report identifiers.
post.description: Looks the user up by name (case-insensitive) and returns the IDs that fill report API calls. A missing user name returns 400; an unknown user returns 404 with found=false.

userName.description: The user's full name, e.g. "Lei Liu".

identifiers.description: id_type -> id_value, keyed by report param names.
